audioAsset.transcript: In my opinion, technology has changed education in profound ways. Students can now access online courses from anywhere, which makes learning far more flexible. However, I believe face to face interaction with teachers remains important for motivation and deeper understanding.

question.title: JavaScript Closures
question.body: What is a closure in JavaScript?

question.title: React Re-renders
question.body: React always re-renders the entire DOM when state changes.

question.title: System Design
question.body: Describe how you would design a URL shortener service. Include considerations for scalability, availability, and data storage.

question.title: Upload your resume
question.body: Please upload a PDF of your resume.

question.title: Technology and Society
question.body: Discuss the impact of social media on modern society. Write at least 150 words.

question.title: Capital of France
question.body: What is the capital city of France?

question.title: Injection Test Essay
question.body: Describe the causes of climate change in at least 100 words.

question.title: When did the London Underground open?
question.body: Select the correct year based on the audio.

question.title: Understanding Audio File Formats
question.body: Which of the following is a common audio file format used for uncompressed audio?
question.explanation: WAV is a widely used format for storing uncompressed audio data.

question.title: Determining Audio Quality
question.body: What factor significantly affects the quality of an audio file?
question.explanation: Bitrate is critical in determining the clarity and quality of audio.

question.title: Sample Rate in Digital Audio
question.body: What is the standard sample rate for audio CDs?
question.explanation: Audio CDs use a sample rate of 44.1 kHz to ensure good quality sound.

question.title: Function of a Codec
question.body: What is the primary function of an audio codec?
question.explanation: An audio codec compresses and decompresses digital audio data.

question.title: Effects of Audio Compression
question.body: Which of the following is a potential downside of audio compression?
question.explanation: Compression can lead to a loss of quality due to the reduction of file size.

question.title: Purpose of Audio Normalization
question.body: What is the main goal of audio normalization?
question.explanation: Normalization aims to adjust audio levels for consistent overall loudness.

question.title: Understanding Dynamic Range
question.body: What does dynamic range refer to in audio processing?
question.explanation: Dynamic range is the difference between the quietest and loudest parts of an audio signal.

question.title: Role of a Digital Audio Workstation
question.body: What is a Digital Audio Workstation (DAW) primarily used for?
question.explanation: A DAW is used for recording, editing, and producing audio files.

question.title: Bits in Audio Files
question.body: In digital audio, what does the 'bit depth' refer to?
question.explanation: Bit depth indicates how many bits are used to represent each audio sample.

question.title: Function of Equalization
question.body: What is the purpose of equalization in audio processing?
question.explanation: Equalization adjusts the balance of different frequency components.

question.title: Describe your hometown
question.body: Speak about where you grew up.

question.title: Follow-up
question.body: One word: did you enjoy it?

question.title: Writing Q
question.body: Write about your city in 150 words.

question.title: Recognizing US Accent
question.body: In the audio, you heard a conversation between two people, one with a US accent. What was the first topic they discussed?
question.explanation: The initial portion of the conversation clearly mentions their first topic.

question.title: Understanding British Accent
question.body: In the British accent audio, what opinion did the speaker express about public transportation?
question.explanation: The speaker clearly articulates their opinion on public transportation in the discussion.

question.title: Identifying Key Details
question.body: What was the main activity mentioned in the audio with the US accent?
question.explanation: Focus on the descriptions given by the speaker around the middle of the audio.

question.title: Analyzing Context
question.body: What conclusion does the British speaker reach regarding city life?
question.explanation: The conclusion is explicitly stated towards the end of the audio clip.

question.title: Inferring Opinions
question.body: In the US accent audio, how does the speaker feel about their recent vacation?
question.explanation: The speaker’s feelings are inferred through their positive language and tone.

question.title: Evaluating Expressions
question.body: How does the British speaker describe their recent weekend trip?
question.explanation: Listen for descriptive adjectives that convey the speaker’s overall impression.
